_comment: App Update Automation Central Configuration. Edit this file, then run: bash scripts/app-update-automation/update-app.sh

app.name: Immunization Log
app.description: Immunization Log - Keep track of your family's vaccination records offline.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Keep track of your family's vaccination records and upcoming doses offline.
features: Track vaccination schedules for your whole family
Manage next dose dates and medical notes securely
Works 100% offline, keeping health records private

mobile.name: Immunization Log (Mobile)
mobile.description: A vaccination record sheet optimized for mobile screens.

tablet.name: Immunization Log (Tablet)
tablet.description: A vaccination record sheet optimized for tablet and desktop layouts.

desktop.name: Immunization Log (Desktop)
desktop.description: A vaccination record sheet optimized for desktop layouts.

pdf.csvShareText: Immunization Log data exported as CSV

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Immunization Log needs access to your camera to capture receipt images or transaction documents.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Immunization Log needs access to your photo library to upload receipt images or transaction documents.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Immunization Log needs microphone access when using the camera.
